title: What Is L-Theanine and Does It Help Women Over 40 Sleep and Focus?
seo_title: What Is L-Theanine? Benefits for Women Over 40
meta_description: L-theanine is the calming amino acid in green tea that promotes relaxed focus and better sleep. Learn what research shows for women over 40.
